rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF BERNARD M FOSTON SR
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/19/2021 (no earlier date available). 1) No proposed orders have been received. 2) No original account statements have been filed. 3) No proof of service of notice of the hearing has been filed. 4) The real property must be appraised by the probate referee. A corrected inventory and appraisal must be filed. 5) No Schedules A and C were attached to the petition. An amendment or amended petition including complete accounting schedules must be filed. 6) The bond amount alleged in paragraph 5 of the petition appears incorrect. 7) Paragraph 11(o) appears incomplete. 8) Is the petitioner waiving compensation for services as conservator? 8) The summary of account and Schedule E show an incorrect beginning date of the account.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE SHOSTAC LIVING TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 01/26/2021 for a court investigator's report on the related conservatorship to be completed and reviewed. 1) Paragraph 14(b)(2) of the petition alleges that personal property is stored, but the inventory and appraisal does not list any tangible personal property. 2) Did the petitioner obtain court authorization for disbursements to Chajinel for home care services alleged in paragraphs 14(b)(4) and 17? Probate Code section 2401(c), CRC 7.1059(a)(2), and LRSF 14.78(A)(7)(e). 3) Please describe the portfolios of the money market mutual fund held in the UBS account, including maturity dates. 4) Paragraph 19 must add the trust's annual income and statutory recovery costs under CRC 7.207. LRSF 14.78(A)(7)(e). 5) Has Anthony Sciortino filed a verified statement of his interest or a petition for special notice under Probate Code section 17204(b)? 6) No original statement of the First Republic Bank accounts showing the balance immediately preceding the date of the petitioner's appointment is on file. Probate Code section 2620(c)(2) and LRSF 14.62(A). 7) Re Exhibit D to the petitioner's declaration (filed 10/27/2020), please identify the time spent on each of the following: A) "work on conflicts issue" on 01/29/2019; B) "transmit fee agreement, authorization and wire transfer instructions" on 01/29/2019; C) "check the IOLTA for wire transfer" on 01/31/2019; D) "E-mail to Saishruti Mutneja" on 02/01/2019; E) "legal research regarding Certificate of Independent Review" on 02/01/2019; F) "lodging the decedent's original will" on 02/01/2019; G) "E-mail Michael B. Bassi regarding location of original documents and Will" on 02/06/2019; H) "Discussions with Michael B. Bassi regarding Client wanting to be Conservator" on 02/06/2019; I) "Review of email from Christy J. Styer regarding bank account titles" on 02/06/2019; and J) "discussion with Donna L. Quan regarding filing for a conservatorship" on 02/06/2019. 8) Re the attorney's declaration (filed 10/27/2020), please identify the time spent on each of the following: A) "legal research on jurisdiction" on 03/11/2019; B) "legal research regarding probate code sections concerning amending trust" on 05/13/2019; C) "Retrieve order on confirming Jonguitud appointment" on 05/29/2019; D) "Short conference with Michael B. Bassi regarding procedures" on 05/29/2019; E) "Conference with Michael B. Bassi regarding bond applications" on 06/06/2019; F) "email to Christy J. Styer regarding marshaling funds" on 06/17/2019; G) "Email to Michael B. Bassi" regarding Trustee doing accounting" on 06/27/2019; H) "Discussion w/ CJS regarding need for budget" on 06/28/2019; I) "Review Christy J. Styer email regarding CEB research" on 07/28/2020; J) "review Probate Code statutes" on 07/28/2020; K) "scan and transmit statements to Donna L. Quan" on 08/24/2020; L) "E-mail(s) to Christy J. Styer regarding closing statement for First Republic Bank" on 09/04/2020; M) "email(s) to Michael B. Bassi and Christy J. Styer regarding recalculation" on 09/08/2020; N) "email to Michael B. Bassi regarding MBBALC" on 09/21/2020; and O) "Email to Michael B. Bassi regarding outstanding questions" on 09/22/2020.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF YVONNE HENDRICKS OWENS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required to determine whether the petition should be granted in full. Remote appearance by video or telephone should be made whenever possible due to the recent stay at home order issued by the mayor. Please review the 8th amended general order for more information. To appear by Zoom, go to Zoom.com and click Join Meeting, and use the ID and password below. Meeting ID: 875 8017 7925 Password: 722809 To appear by telephone through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts, using the meeting ID and password above. Parties appearing should check in for the hearing using their full name.
